name: Mos
description: Mos is a free, open-source macOS utility for smooth mouse wheel scrolling, per-app profiles, independent axes, and mouse button bindings.

authentication.description: Public documentation and discovery endpoints require no account, OAuth flow, API key, or cookie.

capabilities.name: Product context
capabilities.description: Explain Mos features, supported macOS versions, install paths, and project links.

capabilities.name: Release lookup
capabilities.description: Locate GitHub releases, latest downloads, and the public Sparkle appcast.

capabilities.name: Developer discovery
capabilities.description: Find llms.txt, full LLM context, OpenAPI, schema feeds, and agent discovery files.
